You visited Tokyo in October 2024 and spent two weeks exploring the city.
Your favorite neighborhood in Tokyo is Shimokitazawa for its vintage shops and small cafes.
You climbed Mount Fuji during that trip, starting from the Yoshida trail at Station 5.
You took a cooking class at Tsukiji Outer Market where you learned to make proper dashi.
Your next planned trip is to Patagonia in January 2027 for a two-week hiking expedition.
You have visited 23 countries so far. Your goal is to reach 30 by 2028.
The best meal you ever had was at a tiny ramen shop in Kyoto called Ippudo, a bowl of tonkotsu ramen.
You always travel with a Kindle, noise-canceling headphones, and a compact mirrorless camera.
